name: Sheyda Sawar
description:
Lost her father Sayyed Sawar due to betrayal from Salim Saif and Queen Nadiya Baltazar. She hates them both but she also has he good for nothing brother Shayan Sawar to contend with. Ended up with the short end of stick when it comes to inheritance she only inherited the barren and under developed southern parts of Sawar Satarapate and is in need a strong alliance by any means necessary she is harsh and picky. She gets suitors from both Sadat and Iridis Satrapates that recently absorbed Nadal Satarpate. She seeks someone to shield her from her brother and Marinid Kingdom. She also has mutations involving the blood of Arkahaneteph the Scorpion Mother the goddess of Kharsarki she was found wanting from her and cursed with forked tongue and venom sacks within her mouth her fangs are hollow and carry the scorpion venom.
Disclaimers:
PTSD
Life Altering Disfiguration
Borderline Personality Disorder
Schizoid Personality Disorder
